fasting-stuffed-onions-argiro.name: Fasting Stuffed Onions

ingredients.item: 2 fresh versions with leaves, finely chopped
2 fresh versions with leaves, finely chopped

instructions: Clean the large versions and cut slides from the Edges. We cut them verbally to the middle.
Place them in a pot with water – cover them – and place them on fire for about 15 minutes after the boat starts, soften. We put them on a plate and let them cool.
Meanwheele, we're preparing the filling. Wash the rice and let it draw. Pour it with lemon juice.
Heat a pan, add half the olive oil and sauté the drunk finely chopped onion for 5-6 minutes, soften and remove its sweetness.
Add the fresh onion, rice, paste, raisin, pine cone and walnut. Mix to oil all the olderients well and sauteté for 2 more minutes.
Fill in 11⁄2 cup. hot water. Lower the heat and simmer for a few minutes to absorb the many liquids.
Remove the juicy filling from the heat, add the mint, parsley, cumin, clove, spice, salt and pepper, mix and let it cool slightly.
Remove the leaves from the large white versions one by one.
Add 1 tablespoon filling and wrap them tightly.
Add them to the baking pan hard to each other and with the compact downward so that they don't open.
Dissolve the paste in hot water. Add salt, pepper and sugar and mix well.
Pour the injectors into the baking pan with the sauce.
Drizzle with the remaining olive oil and baking the food in a preheated oven, at 200°C, for about 30 minutes.
Turn off the oven and leave the stuffed versions in for 15 minutes to draw the liquids and stay with their oil.

fava-bean-soup-with-vegetables-argiro.name: Fava Bean Soup With Vegetables

ingredients.item: A little olive oil for serving
A little olive oil for serving

instructions: Soak the fava in a bowl with water for 30 minutes. Then rinse it and drag it well.
Heat in a pot with a nick base of 2 tabletspons olive oil and sauté the vegetarians for 3-4 minutes. We put them in a bowl.
Add the dry food to the same oil and mix to oil. Fill in 11⁄2 litres of water.
Once built, lower the focus to modernity and remove the foam fortified on the surface.
Boil the fava in the open pot (without lid) for 30 minutes, stringing once or two in between.
Add the sauteed vegetables, turmeric and paprika and continue cooking for about 20 minutes longer on low heat, until the fava melts complete and starts to become creamy texture.
At the end of the bottle, incorporate the remaining olive oil consistently mixing with a wooden sponge – at a lowways hot spot because as the fava thickens, it is highly building and smashing around.
The fava in this phase is already complete Melted and has become a dilute cream, but its fruit is still visible.
Add some salt and pepper and mix.
If you want smooth text, mash half the mountain and return it to the soup.
We're checking the density of the soup. In the end it must be fluid and creamy with vegetable pieces upper than in a form of chewed potatoes like the classic fava we know.
Transfer to bowl. During serving, sprinkle with some olive oil and lemon juice.

feijoada-soup-teleculinaria.name: Feijoada Soup
instructions: Praise the onions and garlic, peeled and chopped, in a pot with the olive oil, then add the leftovers of the feijoada (meat should be shredded or cut into small pieces), wrap, add water until it covers and let it cook for a few minutes.
Peel the carrot and turnip, cut them into little pieces, as well as the cabbage, and add the vegetables to the soup.
Add the massages, retrieve the salt, season with pepper and cook until the dough is cooked. Serve hot.

fiorentini-with-butternut-squash.name: Fiorentini With Butternut Squash

ingredients.prep: from about 1/2 peeled medium squash; shredded with the coarse grating attachment on a food processor or on a box grater

ingredients.item: Fiorentini or other short curled pasta
Finely grated parmesan or grana padano plus more

instructions: Heat oil and butter in a large heavy pot over medium heat. Add squash and sage and cook, stirring occasionally, until squash begins to brown, about 2 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain pasta, reserving 2 cups pasta cooking liquid.

Add pasta and 1/2 cup pasta cooking liquid to squash and stir to coat. Cook over medium heat, stirring, adding more cooking liquid as needed, until sauce coats pasta. Stir in 1/2 cup Parmesan. Divide pasta among bowls; top with more Parmesan.

fish-pie-argiro.name: Fish Pie

ingredients.item: 4 potatoes cooked and cut into cubes
300 greaves of salmon (unbled and finely chopped)
Beated egg to grind the pie
4 potatoes cooked and cut into cubes
300 greaves of salmon (unbled and finely chopped)
Beated egg to grind the pie

instructions: Clean the leaves, Wash them, and cut them into thin slices.
Clean and cut the onion into thin slices.
Rub the carrot on a dick grutter.
Heat the olive oil in a pan and sauce the leaves over medium heat for 5 minutes, wither.
Remove from heat and set them asside for a while to cool.
In a bowl beat the egg well.
Add the fresh cream cheese and salmon or filled, chopped fish.
Add salt and pepper.
Add to the filling of the fish pie, the saved vegetarians, Carrot, potatoes and dill.
Mix the mixture.

flaky-bread-malawah.name: Flaky Bread (malawah)
instructions: Whisk kosher salt and 3 cups flour in a large bowl. Drizzle in melted butter; mix well. Gradually mix in ¾ cup water. Knead on a lightly floured surface until dough is shiny and very soft, about 5 minutes. Wrap in plastic; let rest in a warm spot at least 4 hours.
Divide dough into 10 pieces and, using your palm, roll into balls. Place balls on a baking sheet, cover with plastic wrap, and let rest 15 minutes.

Working with 1 piece at a time, roll out balls on an unfloured surface with a rolling pin into very thin rounds or ovals about 9” across. (If dough bounces back, cover with plastic and let rest a few minutes.)
Brush tops of rounds with room-temperature butter and sprinkle with sea salt. Roll up each round onto itself to create a long thin rope, then wind each rope around itself to create a tight coil.
Working with 1 coil at a time, roll out on an unfloured surface to 10” rounds no more than ⅛” thick. Stack as you go, separating with sheets of parchment brushed with oil.

Heat a large cast-iron griddle or skillet over medium-high heat. Working 1 at a time, brush both sides of a dough round with room-temperature butter and cook until lightly blistered and cooked through, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer bread to a wire rack and sprinkle with sea salt.
DO AHEAD: Coils can be rolled out 1 month ahead; wrap tightly and freeze. Cook from frozen (add 1–2 minutes to cooking time).

flaky-cranberry-hand-pies.name: Flaky Cranberry Hand Pies

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Cut butter into ½" pieces and freeze on a small plate 30 minutes.

Pulse salt and 2 cups (250 g) flour in a food processor to combine. Remove butter from freezer and add to processor. Pulse until mixture is crumbly and butter is about pea-size, 30–35 quick pulses. Drizzle in buttermilk, then pulse until a rough ball forms (it will be crumbly). Be careful not to overwork dough.
Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface and press into a disk. Wrap in plastic and chill at least 1 hour.
Do ahead: Dough can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled, or freeze up to 3 months. Thaw overnight in refrigerator before using.

While the dough chills, make the filling. Using a vegetable peeler, remove 2 wide strips of zest from orange (avoid white pith as much as possible). Thinly slice zest lengthwise, then cut strips crosswise into very small pieces. Cut orange in half and squeeze 2 Tbsp. juice into a small saucepan. Add cranberries, granulated sugar, vanilla, and 1 tsp. orange zest; stir well. Bring to a boil, stirring until sugar dissolves. Reduce heat; simmer, stirring occasionally, until cranberries are softened, 6–8 minutes.

Stir cornstarch and 1 Tbsp. water in a small bowl to dissolve, then add slurry to cranberry mixture. Simmer, stirring, until filling thickens and looks very shiny and glossy, 30–60 seconds. Scrape into a heatproof bowl and let cool, stirring occasionally. Cover and chill until cold, at least 1 hour.

Roll out dough disk on a lightly floured surface to about ¼" thick. Using a 3"-diameter cookie cutter or glass, punch out rounds, transferring to a baking sheet as you go. You should get 20 rounds; chill until ready to use. Gather remaining dough scraps and press into a disk, then wrap in plastic and chill 20 minutes. Roll out dough disk and punch out as many more rounds as you can get (hopefully 8); arrange on another baking sheet.

Whisk egg in a small bowl. Remove rounds from fridge and brush edges of each round with egg. Spoon a heaping teaspoonful of filling into the center of half of the rounds. Drape remaining rounds, egg-brushed sides down, on top and crimp edges with a fork to seal. Set remaining egg wash aside. Place pies on a parchment-lined baking sheet and freeze 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 400°.

Cut a small slit in the top of each pie, brush with reserved egg, then sprinkle with raw sugar. Line a second baking sheet with parchment paper and divide pies between sheets, spacing at least 2" apart. Bake until crusts are golden brown and fillings are bubbling, 16–18 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack; let cool until warm.

Do ahead: Filling can be made 5 days ahead; keep chilled, or freeze up to 3 months. Thaw overnight in refrigerator before using. Hand pies can be baked 1 day ahead; let cool. Store airtight at room temperature.

flank-steak-tartare-with-carrot-top-sals.name: Flank Steak Tartare With Carrot-top Salsa Verde

ingredients.prep: very thinly sliced on a mandoline, plus  0.25 cup chopped carrot tops

instructions: Prepare a grill for medium heat (or preheat oven to 400°). Combine vinegar, sugar, 1 tsp. salt, and 2 Tbsp. water in a small bowl. Add carrot and let sit until slightly softened, 15–20 minutes.
Meanwhile, mash anchovy and ½ garlic clove to a paste with the side of a chef’s knife. Transfer to a medium bowl and stir in carrot tops, basil, parsley, lemon juice, and 2 Tbsp. oil.
Drain carrot and add to dressing along with steak and shallot. Season with salt and pepper and toss just to combine.

Drizzle bread with oil on both sides and season with salt. Grill until lightly charred, about 1 minute per side (or toast in oven 6–8 minutes). Rub toasts with remaining ½ garlic clove, transfer to a platter, and top with tartare and sorrel, if using.

fluffy-apple-pie-cake-in-5-minutes-argir.name: Fluffy Apple Pie Cake In 5 Minutes

ingredients.item: Scratch from a small lemon and a few drops
Scratch from a small lemon and a few drops

instructions: All materials must be at room temperature.
Preheat the evening to 170.1. 3
We'll use a form or pan round 18 or 20 million.
Butter and flower the form or make non-stick paper.
In a bowl, add the Lurpak soft button with the sugar and beat with a hand mixer at a high speed for 3 to 4 minutes to become cream.
One by one, add the eggs while we continue to hit.
Add the lemon zest, a few drops of lemon juice and salt.
Lower the mixer speed and alternatively add to the mixture, flour and milk gradually.
Pour the mixture into the form.
Peel the apples and cut them with a knife in a small frame of 1 cm.
Put the apples on the surface.
Press gentlemen to get into the mixture.
Mix the sugar with the almond fillet and sprinkle the whole surface.

Bake for about 55 minutes on the bottom grill in the resistors or medium grill in the air. It is ready when it is inflamed, browned and the blade from the knife comes out clean and dry from the center of the mixture.
Allow it to cool for a few minutes and stabilise.
We're taking off with caution.
Sprinkle with powdered sugar and cinnamon.

fluffy-pudding-with-chicken-and-mushroom.name: Fluffy Pudding With Chicken And Mushroom s
fluffy-pudding-with-chicken-and-mushroom.original_name: Αφράτη πουτίγκα με κοτόπουλο και μανιτάρια
instructions: Dry the Chicken very well and cut it into thin slices.
Add salt and pepper, sprinkle with some olive oil and mix to season well.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium to high heat and sauce for 5 minutes the Chicken pieces to turn evening. Transfer to a plate and cover them to keep warm.
In the same pan, add the remaining olive oil and add the leek, celery, carrots and mushrooms (full and slides).
Add some salt and sauté for 5-6 minutes for the vegetarians to drink their liquids and turn golden.
Sprinkle with flour, mix and sauce for 1-2 minutes to bake.
Add the broth, milk, nutmeg and mix with a spoon to dissolve the flower.
Simmer with the cognac and simmer for 4-5 minutes until the sauce thoughts slightly. Try the salt and pepper and remove the vessel from the house.
Cut the bread into triangles and buttered small fireproof vessel, set as in padding so that one half covers the other.
Pour half the sauce and half the vegetarians.
Spread the Chicken over a layer, as well as all the liquids it has taken out in the meantime on the plate. Pour with the rest of the sauce and vegetarians.
Sprinkle with chives, parmesan and graviera.
Bake the powdering in a well preheated oven at 160°C, in the air, in the medium grill, for 25 minutes, until the cheeses make light crust.
Let it stand for 10 minutes outside the open and serve with a spark while still warm.

fluke-poke-with-coconut-rice-and-pickled.name: Fluke Poke With Coconut Rice And Pickled Onions

ingredients.item: Torn cilantro leaves with tender stems

instructions: Place onion slices in a medium bowl. Bring vinegar, 1/3 cup sugar, 2 tsp. salt, and 1/2 cup water to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium-high heat and cook, stirring occasionally, until sugar is dissolved, about 5 minutes. Immediately pour brine over onion and let cool. Cover and chill at least 1 hour.

Meanwhile, rinse rice until water runs clear (this removes surface starch and keeps rice from getting gummy). Combine rice, coconut cream, and 1 1/2 cups water in a medium saucepan, season lightly with salt, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook until rice is tender, 15–18 minutes. Remove from heat and let sit (keep covered) 10 minutes; fluff coconut jasmine rice with a fork. Keep warm.

Mix jalapeño, soy sauce, lime zest, lime juice, oil, ginger, garlic, and remaining ½ tsp. sugar in a medium bowl. Add fluke, macadamia nuts, and drained pickled red onion to jalapeño-ginger dressing; season with salt and toss gently to combine. Add cilantro and toss again.
Divide rice among bowls and top with fluke mixture and pieces of nori.
Red onion can be pickled 5 days ahead; keep chilled. Dressing can be made 1 day ahead; cover and chill.

freezer-prep-mini-quiches.name: Freezer-prep Mini Quiches
instructions: Preheat oven to 375ºF (190ºC), and lightly grease a 12-cup nonstick muffin tin.
Cut the pie crusts into 12 circles, 4½ inches (12 cm) in diameter.
Press pie crust circles into the muffin tin cups.
Bake for 10 minutes.
Mix the ingredients for the broccoli cheddar.
Mix the ingredients for the onion and pepper.
Mix the ingredients for the tomato and goat cheese.
Pour each filling over their own row of 4 crusts.
Bake for 20-30 minutes, or until filling is fully cooked and no longer runny.
After removing from the oven, run a butter knife or thin spatula around each cup to prevent crust from sticking to the sides.
Eat while still warm, or cool, then freeze in an airtight container for up to 1 month. To reheat, microwave for 60-90 seconds.
Enjoy!

french-toast-dippers.name: French Toast Dippers
instructions: Flatten each piece of white bread using a rolling pin.
Whisk 1/4 cup butter, sugar, and cinnamon together in a bowl. Whisk eggs, milk, and nutmeg together in a separate bowl.
Spread cinnamon butter mixture onto 1 side of each piece bread. Roll bread around the cinnamon butter. Dip rolled bread into the egg mixture.
Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a skillet over medium heat; cook the dipped bread rolls until golden, about 2 minutes per side.

fresh-cranberry-upside-down-cake.name: Fresh Cranberry Upside-down Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9-inch round cake pan.

Heat brown sugar and ¼ cup butter in a saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until butter melts and sugar dissolves, 3 to 5 minutes; carefully transfer to the prepared cake pan. Scatter cranberries over top; set aside.
Combine flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl; set aside.

Beat white sugar and ½ cup butter together in a separate bowl with an electric mixer on medium-high speed until light and fluffy, 2 to 3 minutes. Add egg yolks, one at a time, beating well after each addition. Add 1 teaspoon vanilla extract; beat well. Fold in flour mixture in 3 batches, alternating with milk, using a silicone or rubber spatula.

Beat egg whites in a separate glass, metal, or ceramic bowl with an electric mixer or a whisk until soft peaks form. Add cream of tartar; beat until stiff peaks form. Fold beaten egg whites into batter using a spatula. Spoon batter over cranberries in the pan, spreading evenly.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick or skewer inserted into center comes out clean, 55 to 60 minutes. Cool in the pan on a wire rack for 15 minutes. Run a knife around the edges of the pan to loosen cake. Invert onto a serving plate, let stand for 5 minutes, then remove pan.
Whip heavy cream in a bowl with an electric mixer or a whisk until soft peaks form; stir in confectioners' sugar and ¼ teaspoon vanilla extract.
Cut cake into wedges; top with whipped cream.

fried-rice-devious-shrimp-scramble.name: Fried Rice: Devious Shrimp Scramble
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine the shrimp and teriyaki sauce. Marinate in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
In a large pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add the marinated shrimp and cook until pink and opaque, about 5 minutes. Remove the shrimp from pan and set aside.
To the same pan, add the vegetables and eggs to the pan and cook until the eggs are set, about 3 minutes.
Add the cauliflower rice, soy sauce, and sesame oil and cook until heated through, about 5 minutes.
Serve warm.
Enjoy!

frozen-margarita-pie.name: Frozen Margarita Pie
instructions: Melt 6 Tbsp. butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Let cool slightly.
Crumble 10 graham crackers into the bowl of a food processor. Add 3 Tbsp. sugar, ¼ tsp. salt, and melted butter to bowl and process until mixture resembles wet sand.
Transfer graham cracker mixture to a shallow 9" pie pan. Using a measuring cup, press firmly into bottom and up sides of dish. Freeze 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, whisk ¾ cup heavy cream in a medium bowl until cream begins to thicken to the point you see ripples and stiff peaks begin to form, 3–5 minutes.

Cut 4 limes in half and juice into a fine-mesh sieve set over a glass measuring cup (you should have about ½ cup juice). Pour lime juice into another medium bowl and whisk in 14 oz. condensed milk, 3 Tbsp. tequila, and remaining ¼ tsp. salt until smooth.
Fold half of whipped cream into lime juice mixture, carefully folding under and over while turning the bowl. Add remaining whipped cream and continue to fold until no streaks remain.
Remove pie pan from freezer and pour in filling. Using the back of a spoon, gently spread filling to edge of crust.
Using a microplane, zest half of the remaining lime over pie.
Freeze pie at least 8 hours, or preferably overnight.

frozen-watermelon-margarita.name: Frozen Watermelon Margarita
instructions: Remove rind from 1 3-pound piece watermelon and cut enough fruit into 1-inch pieces to measure 5 cups. Freeze watermelon in a sealable plastic bag at least 3 hours and up to 1 week.

Transfer frozen watermelon to a blender and add 1 cup blanco tequila, ½ cup fresh lime juice, and ¼ cup sugar. Blend until smooth. Taste and add more sugar if desired. Divide margarita among 6 glasses and garnish each with a watermelon wedge.

Editor’s note: This recipe was first printed in the July 1997 issue of ‘Gourmet.’ Head this way for more of our best watermelon recipes →

fruit-ice-cream-baby-from-14-months-tele.name: Fruit Ice Cream (baby From 14 Months)
fruit-ice-cream-baby-from-14-months-tele.original_name: Gelados de fruta ( bebé a partir dos 14 meses)
instructions: Wash and dry the strawberries, remove their feet, cut them in half, put them in the blender, add 1 spoon (soup) of the powdered sugar and reduce the puree.
Then run the puree through a strainer and divide it into nine tins of ice cream. Take it to the freezer until it solidifies.
Mix 1 spoon of sugar with orange juice, stir and then add it to the ice cream forms. Take it back to the freezer until it's solid.

Finally peel the kiwis, cut them into pieces, throw them in the blender, add the rest of the powdered sugar and reduce the puree. Put the puree through a strainer, finish filling the ice cream, put the sticks in the freezer until solidify.
Pass the shapes by water, unform the ice creams and serve them decorated to taste.

funny-sofas-lezzet.name: Funny Sofas
instructions: 1. For salted sofa, cut the bread with round die.
2. Apply butter and cheese, respectively.
3. slice tomato thin and create eyebrows and lips.
4. Prepare the eyes with small round dies and cut off.
5.  Sivri biberleri temizleyin.
6. 1cm thick and prepare the nose.
7. For sweet sofa, cut bread with round die.
8. Remove butter and marmelate to the bases.
9. slice and prepare the mouth.
10. Cut off and slice the ring and prepare eyes.
11. 11. Use grape nose, small grapes as eyes.
12. Serve.
